hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+merge|/pulls/[0-9]+/merge|mergePullRequest' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"AI agents are not allowed to merge PRs (PreToolUse guard)."}}' || true
